note: Placeholders match those in the inscription checklist for 1:1 string replacement by tools/fill-tier2-manifests.mjs. Chunked modules (pokebells_inscriber) use a *_chunks array instead of *_inscription_id — bootloader fetches each chunk, concatenates bytes in order, and blob-imports. The bootloader refuses to load a manifest whose ids don't match /^[0-9a-f]{64}i\d+$/. Keys are locked (bootloader reads these exact names); values can change across manifest versions as long as the referenced modules honor the contract each key represents.
